'''Acid Plants''' were a type of [[Plant/Legends|plant]] found on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] and [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]] that were dangerous to [[Human/Legends|Humans]]. Acid Plants shot out a gland-like [[Acid/Legends|acid]] onto anyone who wandered under it.<ref name="SEMP" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Super Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back]]'' {{1st}}
